WITHOUT A PROPOSED VALUATION PLACED ON THE SETTLEMENT BETWEEN PLAINTIFFS AND CLYDE MACHINES, THE SETTLEMENT CANNOT BE DETERMINED TO BE IN GOOD FAITH PER THE GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT/CREDITS STATUTORY SCHEME. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement [Ccp 877.6]
Off Calendar Nov-08-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert C. Gebhardt, Esq., of Wilson Elser Moswkowitz Edelman & Dicker LLP, for Defendant and moving party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT CLYDE MACHINES, INCORPORATED'S Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement [Ccp 877.6] is Granted. No opposition was filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion And Momtion To Contest Clyde Machines, Inc.'S Application For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement;
Off Calendar Oct-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANTHONY LUBEL APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. STEPHANIE N. BRIE OF THE FITZPATRICK & HUNT, TEL. NO. (213) 873-2139 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT SWISSPORT USA INCORPORATED;
ATTY. ROBERT C. GEBHARDT OF WILSON ELSER LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 625-9320 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT CLYDE MACHINES.

RULING - A R G U E D; Defendant Swissport USA, Incorporated's motion to contest Clyde Machines' application for determination of good faith settlement is granted and the application of defendant Clyde machines' for a determination of good faith settlement is denied. Without a proposed valuation placed on the settlement between plaintiffs and Clyde Machines, the settlement cannot be determined to be in good faith per the good faith settlement/credits statutory scheme. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/HEK)
